abstract:
Farmers’ sensitized and practiced precision fertilizer application
a)Awareness creation on parcel/site-specific fertilizer use, use the parcel map for registration
b)Farmers informed about the farmer and crop-specific rates of fertilizer
c)Measure the right type and quantity of fertilizer per parcel
d)Field practice for uniform and row application of fertilizer, and Urea top dressing

documents.main: Scaling of Harmonized Digital Fertilizer Advisory Innovation Use Practices.pdf

files.filename: Scaling of Harmonized Digital Fertilizer Advisory Innovation Use Practices.pdf

keywords: fertilizers, agronomy, innovation, extension activities, Ethiopia, Eastern Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa, Africa
note: The CGIAR Sustainable Science Program forms a part of CGIAR’s new Research Portfolio, addressing key challenges in agri-food systems by fostering efficient production of nutritious foods and safeguarding the environment to create fair employment opportunities, as we simultaneously tackle climate change, soil degradation, pests, diseases, and desertification. Its research is being implemented by CGIAR researchers from ICRISAT and ALLIANCE Bioversity International CIAT in close partnership with the Ministry of Agriculture, Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research, Regional Agricultural Research Institutes (Amhara, Oromia, South, Central, South West), Self Help Africa (SHA), Catholic Church South Synod, Sasakawa Africa Association (SAA), People in Need, Enhanced Rural Self Help Association (ERSHA), Precision Development (PxD), and Digital Green.
title: Scaling of Harmonized Digital Fertilizer Advisory in Ethiopia: Innovation Use Practice
